title: Sr/RF Solution Engineer (Aerospace/RF)
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a technically skilled and customer-focused engineer to support advanced RF, microwave, and wireless communication systems.


Key Responsibilities

  • Customer Engagement & Technical Leadership
    Act as a subject matter expert for A&D and wireless communication clients, delivering both pre-sales consultation and post-sales technical support for sophisticated test solutions.
  • Solution Architecture & Integration
    Translate customer requirements into tailored solutions, including RF channel emulators, wireless emulators, and network modeling tools.
  • Demonstrations & Enablement
    Lead technical presentations, hands-on demos, and training sessions to showcase solution capabilities and accelerate customer adoption.
  • Content Development
    Create technical collateral such as white papers, application notes, and integration guides focused on wireless and defense-specific use cases.
  • System Integration & Troubleshooting
    Support the deployment and debugging of complex systems involving RF/uW instrumentation, digital/mixed-signal components, and digital twin environments.
  • Technology Monitoring
    Stay ahead of industry trends and emerging technologies in wireless communications and defense systems.

What You’ll Need

  • Education
    A degree in Electrical or Electronics Engineering (Bachelor’s or Master’s) or a related technical discipline.
  • Experience
    3+ years in a technical role involving RF systems, wireless communications, or test and measurement, preferably in aerospace, defense sectors.
  • Technical Expertise
    Deep understanding of RF/microwave systems, signal generation/analysis, radar, satellite, and terrestrial wireless technologies, Hands-on experience with test instruments such as oscilloscopes, spectrum/network analyzers, signal generators, and RF channel/network emulators as well as familiarity with EMSO and digital twin tool experience.



If you are interested in the position , kindly send your CVs in to jasper.soh(@)randstad.com.sg


Please include your availability, expected salary and reason for leaving your current job.


We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted

EA: 94C3609 / Reg: R25154228

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
